summary: Enterprise AI projects often fail due to data-related issues, highlighting the need for a data strategy before an AI strategy.
Companies struggle with data quality, integration, and governance, leading to AI project failures.
A data strategy is essential to ensure data quality, integration, and governance, making AI projects more successful.
analysis.pain_point: Data quality, integration, and governance issues blocking AI project success
